meaning: unit [核]西韦特单位(γ射线剂量单位)
examples: The radiation dose can be expressed in units of Sievert (Sv).
Exposure to 1,000 millisieverts (1 sievert) of radiation can cause radiation sickness.
Nakagawa said that an accumulated dose of 4 sievert kills 50% of those exposed within 60 days.
Two of the three workers inside the plant received more than the lethal dose of seven sieverts (a sievert is the unit that measures the intensity of radiation's impact on the body).
